items.title: Raksha Mantri releases ‘Defence Forces Vision 2047: A Roadmap for a Future-Ready Indian Military’
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence Raksha Mantri releases ‘Defence Forces Vision 2047: A Roadmap for a Future-Ready Indian Military’ Posted On: 10 MAR 2026 12:23PM by PIB Delhi Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh released ‘Defence Forces Vision 2047: A Roadmap for a Future-Ready Indian Military’ at an event in South Block, New Delhi on March 10, 2026. This comprehensive blueprint has been articul…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah greets CISF personnel on its Raising Day
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah greets CISF personnel on its Raising Day Whether safeguarding the nation’s vital installations or shielding nation during crises, their dedication reflects true spirit of patriotism and professionalism Tributes to martyrs who made supreme sacrifice for the country Posted On: 10 MAR 2026 11:3…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Savitribai Phule on her death anniversary
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Savitribai Phule on her death anniversary Savitribai Phule Ji launched a movement to connect women with education at a time when many social evils were prevalent in society She established the country’s first school for girls and spread the idea of equality among the masses Po…
